title: Statistical area 1 dataset for 2018 Census – updates and corrections | Stats NZ
content:
## Statistical area 1 dataset for 2018 Census – updates and corrections
11 June 2020, 11:30am
Statistical area 1 dataset for 2018 Census – updates and corrections to the total New Zealand file lists corrections and updates we have made to the dataset since initial publication on 16 December 2019.
- Updated incorrectly labelled 'Total stated' and 'Not elsewhere included' column headers for the 'Years at usual residence' and 'Usual residence one year ago indicator' variables.
- Corrected the ‘median ages’ category, which had been suppressed for the ‘Age in five-year groups’ variable across all geographies in all regional Excel workbooks.
- Corrected misaligned classification categories for the SA2, ward, district health board, territorial authority, and regional council tables under the ‘Birthplace (broad geographic areas)’, ‘Years since arrival in New Zealand’, ‘Ethnic group (grouped total responses)’, ‘Languages (total responses)’, and ‘Māori descent’ variables in the files for:

### Individual (part 3b)
- Removed total row in the Local board (Auckland Region) tab, in the Auckland region workbook, for consistency with other regional workbooks.
- Corrected the ‘Total unoccupied private dwelling’ category, which had been overly suppressed for the ‘Dwelling occupancy status’ variable across all geographies in 2018-SA1-dataset-dwellings regional Excel workbooks.

## Total New Zealand files
- In Local board (Auckland Region) tab, Total NZ (Local Board Area (Auckland Region)) updated to read, Total (Local Board Area (Auckland Region))
- In Local board (Auckland Region) tab, header row updated to remove 'for all New Zealand'.
- Removed duplicated rows within some SA1 and ward geographies in the following files:
- Individual_part1_totalNZ-wide_format_updated_28-4-20.csv
- Age_five_year_groups-long_format_updated_28-4-20.csv
- Addition of median age by sex
- Corrected ‘Total NZ (Local Board Area (Auckland Region))’ row so it no longer displays the total for all New Zealand local boards
- Updated quality rating for the 'years since arrival in New Zealand' variable from moderate quality to high quality
- In the file ‘Census night population count – long format corrected – CSV' within the ‘Individual_part1_totalNZ_corrected’ folder, we changed the geographic location from ‘usual residence’ to ‘census night’. This resulted in a variation in the 2018 data of between 48 people (Gisborne region) and approximately 18,000 people (Auckland region). Variances differ for 2006 and 2013 data
- In Local board (Auckland Region) tab, Total NZ (Local Board Area (Auckland Region)) updated to read, Total (Local Board Area (Auckland Region))
- In Local board (Auckland Region) tab, header row updated to remove 'for all New Zealand'.
- Addition of study participation by census usually resident population count
- Addition of median personal income for 2013 and 2018
- Corrected ‘Total NZ (Local Board Area (Auckland Region))’ row so it no longer displays the total for all New Zealand local boards
- Individual home ownership – categories not collected in some census years have been updated to display the not available symbol ‘..’
- Updated quality rating for the 'study participation' variable from high quality to moderate quality
- In table 2, Statistical area 2 data about individuals for all New Zealand, main means of travel to education, for educational institution address for Upper Wairau and Lower Wairau, we inserted the correct values for empty cells in rows 1674 and 1680

### Individual (part 3a)
- In Local board (Auckland region) tab, Total NZ (Local Board Area (Auckland Region)) updated to read, Total (Local Board Area (Auckland Region))
- In Local board (Auckland Region) tab, header row updated to remove 'for all New Zealand'.
- Addition of occupation by workplace address and Industry by workplace address for 2006 and 2013
- Corrected ‘Total NZ (Local Board Area (Auckland Region))’ row so it no longer displays the total for all New Zealand local boards
- Updated quality rating for the work and labour force status variable from moderate quality to high quality
- Updated quality rating for the status in employment variable from moderate quality to high quality

### Individual (part 3b)
- In Local board (Auckland region) tab, Total NZ (Local Board Area (Auckland Region)) updated to read, Total (Local Board Area (Auckland Region))
- In Local board (Auckland Region) tab, header row updated to remove 'for all New Zealand'.
- Addition of this workbook which includes total hours worked in employment per week, main means of travel to work by usual residence address, main means of travel to work by workplace address, unpaid activities
- In Local board (Auckland Region) tab, Total NZ (Local Board Area (Auckland Region)) updated to read, Total (Local Board Area (Auckland Region))
- In Local board (Auckland Region) tab, header row updated to remove 'for all New Zealand'.
- Corrected the ‘Total unoccupied private dwelling’ category, which had been overly suppressed for the ‘Dwelling occupancy status’ variable in the following files:
- 2018-SA1-dataset-dwelling-total-NZ_updated_11-6-20.xlsx
- Dwellings_totalNZ-wide_format_updated_11-6-20.csv
- Occupancy_long_updated_11-6-20.csv
- Corrected ‘Total NZ (Local Board Area (Auckland Region))’ row so it no longer displays the total for all New Zealand local boards
- Updated quality rating for the number of rooms variable from poor quality to moderate quality
- In Local board (Auckland Region) tab, Total NZ (Local Board Area (Auckland Region)) updated to read, Total (Local Board Area (Auckland Region))
- In Local board (Auckland Region) tab, header row updated to remove 'for all New Zealand'.
- Addition of median weekly rent
- Tenure of household – corrected the subject population from occupied private dwellings to households in occupied private dwellings
- Sector of landlord – categories not collected in some census years have been updated to display the not available symbol ‘..’
- Number of motor vehicles – categories not collected in some census years have been updated to display the not available symbol ‘..’
- Access to telecommunication systems – categories not collected in some census years have been updated to display the not available symbol ‘..’
- In table 4, Local board area (Auckland region) data about households for all New Zealand, 2006 Census, Tenure of household (level 1), for occupied private dwellings, we:
- inserted the correct value for an empty cell in row 18
- removed the commas and decimal places for consistency with all other tables/worksheets in the dataset.
- Employment and unemployment
- Gender sex and intersex
- Information and communication technology
- Marriages civil unions and divorces
- Statistical area 1 dataset for 2018 Census – updated March 2020
- Statistical area 1 dataset for 2018 Census – updated March 2020 12 March 2020
